programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.desc: When Ania and Vlad married they were impoverished

programme.title: Born To Race Fast Track
programme.desc: Danny Krueger is a twenty-year old street racer who plays by his own rules. After winning a scholarship to the prestigious Fast Lane Racing Academy, Danny finds himself competing against some of the fiercest young drivers in the world. Tension soars on and off the track, and a terrible incident leaves Danny without a racing partner. Facing dismissal from the academy, Danny is forced to team up with an old rival. The pair must learn to set aside their differences as they vie for rookie spots on a professional racing team.

programme.title: Patth
programme.desc: Summaries. Avi comes from a poor family and lives with his mother and sister, Nandini. He sees that Nandini has befriended a local gangster by the name of Bhullar, and quietly resents this. When Nandini is killed, Avi and two male friends, Golu and Hari, decide to avenge her death - by killing Bhullar.

programme.desc: Blackburn's your man for the ultimate early 70s party playlist. How about some pure pop cheese from big names & forgotten acts that'll have you singing your head off? Let's bop!

programme.desc: 60 solid hours of hips-don't-lie, glitter-won't-quit, disco-ball-spinning party brilliance. Basically, if it wiggles - it's in!

programme.desc: 60 minutes of lesser heard hits from 1985. Including Bruce Springsteen, Jaki Graham, Sting, Prince & The Cure.

programme.desc: 60 minutes of lesser heard hits from 1987. Including Nick Kamen, Kenny G, Climie Fisher, The Jets & Boogie Box High.

programme.desc: Popcorn at the ready, these are NOW 80s' biggest songs from the movies. But don't forget to switch off those mobile phones!

programme.title: 90s v 00s Rock Anthems!
programme.desc: 40 classic rock anthems back to back - one from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!

programme.title: Weekend Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 all weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!

programme.title: 50 Timeless Soft Rock Classics!
programme.desc: Laid back, timeless, soft rock tracks & big power ballads, each with an unforgettable chorus! Expect plenty of Fleetwood Mac, Foreigner, Pat Benatar, Spandau Ballet & Toto.

programme.title: Feel-Good Waves
programme.desc: A playlist that rolls in bright and easy, like a wave you didn't see coming.

programme.title: Where the Light Stays
programme.desc: Soft feelings, bright youth, and moments that slowly come into light.A playlist for the quiet shift between spring and early summer.

programme.title: Heartfelt Live Clip Collection
programme.desc: Moments where raw emotion and quiet sincerity come through naturally.

programme.title: Bright with Attitude
programme.desc: A playlist layered with bright rhythms and effortless confidence.

programme.title: Hearts2Hearts 'RUDE!' MV
programme.desc: ‘RUDE!' is a house-based dance track driven by a rhythmic groove and bouncy synths, expressing the playful rebellion of girls who defy fixed rules. It follows their mission to revive a faded ‘Super Heart' overtaken by ‘Fake Hearts', matching the song's lively yet bold spirit.

programme.title: NCT JNJM 'BOTH SIDES' MV
programme.desc: ‘BOTH SIDES' is an energetic hip-hop dance track that blends refined sound design, smooth drum beats, and witty vocals with sharp rap. Its lyrics playfully capture the idea of captivating someone with two contrasting charms, drawing them into a delightful dilemma between equally irresistible choices.

programme.title: EXO 'Crown' MV
programme.desc: 'Crown' is a hard dance song that fuses Atlanta trap drums, heavy metal guitars, and EDM synths to break genre boundaries. Siren effects and powerful vocals heighten the dramatic tension, while the lyrics liken a precious loved one to a crown coveted by many, conveying a desperate resolve to protect them at all costs.

programme.title: Simply K-Pop CON-TOUR Ep.481
programme.desc: Dreamcatcher Weeekly NADA SEONGRI KIM WOOJIN SINCHONTIGER with RANI SINCHONTIGER 2Z 777 (Triple Seven) BZ-BOYS Maka'Maka

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is the quartet W24! This band burst into the music scene in March 2018 with the song Always Missing You. Composed of vocalist Cheong Ho-won guitarist Kim Yun-soo keyboardist Aaron Park and drummer Kim Jong-gil they compose write and produce all the songs they release and perform. Their name is short for World 24 Hours expressing the band's desire for their music to be heard 24 hours a day around the world. Thanks to their outstanding talents W24 won the Focus Award at the Asia Artist Awards in 2018 and the Best K-Pop Rookie Award at the 2019 Korea Culture Entertainment Grande Prize. Also they participated in The Asian Top Band a project to discover world-class musicians involving 8 Asian countries as the Korean representatives and became the winners. In this episode W24 performs Once Upon A Time Breath Under The Tree and more to show off thier musicality. Tune in to I'm LIVE and meet these four talented musicians!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Zitten! This artist made his debut in 2005 with the EP Rock Doves and has been nourishing the hearts of countless listeners with his delicate lyrical lyrics and heartwarming music since then. Also known for drawing his inspiration from various everyday elements he comforts our souls in a calm yet powerful way. Last December Zitten released the Christmas song All You Need Is A Carol to tell us not to take anything for granted. Then in January this year he started a new project to produce music inspired by places he visited books he read things he purchased and films he watched. The very first outcome of that new project is the song Little forest which he performs on I'm LIVE. He also performs Let's do well Something to say and more to showcase the essence of his artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and meet Zitten!

programme.title: I'M LIVE
programme.desc: Joining us on this week's I'm LIVE is singer-songwriter Choi Gonne! Choi Gonne burst into the music scene in 2010 with the EP 36.5°. Since then she has covered numerous genres of music ranging from folk music rock and jazz not to mention pansori that she learned to sing when she was a child. She's also known for her mix of melodic acoustic themes powerful vocals and sheer lyrical prowess which together make her one of a kind. Last but not least she's the first Korean artist to be invited three times to perform at the Glastonbury Festival in the U.K. In this episode Choi Gonne performs ‘HIGHLANDER' ‘Eric's song' and more to display the essence of her artistry. Tune in to I'm LIVE this week and meet Choi Gonne!

programme.title: Less than Evil

programme.title: Please dont Date Him
programme.desc: Home appliance developer Seo Jisung dreams of an easy life like a welldesigned algorithm. The “smart voice recognition AI refrigerator” she is in the process of developing accidentally gets combined with an antiterrorism super sensor chip that went missing from the National Intelligence Service Korea. Her refrigerator that couldn't even determine whether an ingredient was rotten suddenly identifies human lowlifes without even needing her to tell it to. This leads to revealing the truth about Jisung's fiancé. The man she thought of as an elite was actually a criminal. At the perfect timing, Jung Gukhee, a firefighter that seems too good to be true shows up in her life.

programme.title: W-Two Worlds Apart

programme.title: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Hamare
programme.desc: Bhabhi Ke Pyare Pritam Humaare Is A Light-Hearted Celebrity Chat Show Hosted By One Of India'S Most Famous Rj– Pritam Singh. In Each Episode, He Will Welcome Top Female Celebrities From The Entertainment Industry Who Have Played The Roles Of Bhabhi'S & Bahu'S On-Screen, Adding A Pinch Of Glamour To The Show. These Female Celebrities Will Talk About Their Real-World, Tell Their Untold Stories And Reveal How They Live Off-Camera. What'S More? programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Laal Banarasi
programme.desc: The story highlights the exploitation happening with the ‘Bunkars' in Banaras, whose craft is appreciated all around the world, but they are paid peanuts by the traders. Amidst this, blooms a love story between the two opposites - Gauri, a bunkar and Garv, a trader. The story is of Gauri who belongs to the bunkar community facing series of incidents which destroys her family and swears to bring about a change in their life and stop the exploitation by directly trading the sarees. This becomes a battle with traders creating hurdles in her life but she is unstoppable.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu
programme.desc: This light-hearted comic romp, designed for children between the ages of 4 and 12, is set in a lovely wooded wonderland in rural Northeast China. Though the surroundings might seem idyllic, deep in the heart of the region peace has been disrupted by the dastardly Logger Vick, who schemes to transform the majestic forest into his own personal lumberyard!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Autumn Awosomeness
programme.desc: Set during the harvest, this season finds Briar, Bramble, and their friends spending every day gathering as much food as possible for the upcoming winter. While they look for mushrooms, corn, and of course Bramble's favorite – honey, they have to keep a sharp eye out for the pesky Logger Vick! Fun falls with every leaf this season as the crew finds new adventures with some new friends. Follow the funny and join in on the laughter as it echoes throughout Pine Tree Mountain.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Shrunk
programme.desc: This series follows Lakha, Bablu and Dablu on brand-new wild adventures. Pine Tree Mountain has become a preserve that draws visitors from all around to see its natural beauty and wildlife. This wildlife now includes some new but familiar residents: Hugo and friends from the hit movie, The Big Top Secret!

programme.title: Cindrella
programme.desc: Young Cinderella, struggling with abuse from her stepmother and stepsisters, receives help from her fairy godmother and animal friends while finding adventure and romance with a dashing man who hides the fact that he is a prince.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster Paln
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Saamagri Sampatti Aur Sauda
programme.desc: Saamagri Aur Sampatti is an animated series detailing the journey of various commodities that shaped India's history through their trade, usage, and spread. The history of a few key commodities for India, such as pepper, silk, coffee, and cotton, are covered in this fascinating 9-episode series.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Kahi Suni
programme.desc: In a land steeped in mysticism, spirituality, and religion, the imagination of the followers has much room to flourish. Stories abound – some based on truth and some only on fractions of the truth. Nevertheless, these stories have enchanted their listeners for eons. Kahi Suni packs away our skepticism and takes us on a ride through the legendary tales of India. Each destination covered in the episodes has been the birthplace of a legend and each legend has given rise to the recognition of that location. Following our host from north to south and east to west, we journey through the land of myths of legends uncovering the origins of evIery story.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: The Way Back Home
programme.desc: Rohan Thakur finds his true calling as he begins a journey to revisit his roots in Himachal Pradesh. Way Back Home is as much a travelogue of childhood, as of growing up. Get ready for a journey of a lifetime

programme.title: Big Angry Snake – Can It Be Rescued?
programme.desc: A huge, angry snake must be rescued. Coyote carefully relocates the serpent while explaining its importance to the ecosystem.Are baby snakes just as dangerous as adults? Coyote explains how venom works in hatchlings and why they're not to be underestimated.

programme.title: Bullet Ant Box – Will I Get Stung?!

programme.title: New Species! World's Rarest Toad Found?
programme.desc: A rare toad species makes a surprise appearance. Mark reveals what makes it the world's rarest and where it was finally found.Deep in Ecuador, Mark finds a strange, oversized leaf insect. Its camouflage is astonishing, making it one of the best hidden creatures alive.

programme.title: Abandoned Island! – Can We Survive 24 Hours?
programme.desc: Can Coyote and his team survive 24 hours on an abandoned island? With no supplies, the wilderness becomes both home and threat.

programme.desc: It's a venom showdown—black mamba vs green mamba. Coyote helps milk these snakes and explores which is more dangerous and why.

programme.title: Burned by a Giant Fireworm!
programme.desc: The giant fireworm brings the burn—literally. Mark handles this bizarre sea creature and ends up with chemical irritation on his skin.Coyote explores a lost island, teeming with mystery. From rare creatures to haunting terrain, this wild place holds unexpected surprises.

programme.title: Jellyfish Jolt! Coyote's Shocking Experiment!

programme.title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range_en
programme.sub-title: Wellbeing behind the wheel – The new Bentley Azure Range
programme.desc: To celebrate the arrival of the new Bentayga EWB, an exclusive First Edition is now available. Subject to a limited production run for the first twelve months of orders, it combines many of the most desirable options available for the car with a package of eye-catching details found only on Bentley First Editions. First Edition badging can be seen to the exterior of the car – a theme that extends inside, with badging on the veneered fascia, as well as embroidery on the seats. Unique First Edition contrast stitching and embroidery adorns the seats and, depending on the choice of veneers, handcrafted metal overlays just 0.075 mm thick can be applied to the fascia and waistrails in the front and the rear door veneer. The First Edition offers elegant and timeless design, focusing on maximum comfort and well-being. This specifically tailored specification includes a unique 22” ten-spoke directional wheel and bright lower bumper grilles. Other additional features as standard include unique quilted seats, mood lighting, a heated steering wheel, and increased driver's assistance aids. Attention to detail is clear, from the badging that identifies the car to the jewelled caps on the fuel and oil fillers.

programme.title: The new Porsche 911 GT3 R
programme.sub-title: Design_en - The new Porsche 911 GT3 R - Design
programme.desc: The turbocharged three-litre flat-six in the new 911 GTS delivers 353 kW (480 PS). Maximum torque is 570 Nm, an increase of 20 Nm over its predecessor. Zero to 100 km/h takes just 3.3 seconds (911 Carrera 4 GTS: Fuel consumption combined (NEDC) 10.5 – 9.7 l/100 km, Fuel consumption combined (WLTP) 11.4 – 10.6 l/100 km, CO₂ emissions combined (NEDC) 240 – 222 g/km, CO₂ emissions combined (WLTP) 259 – 240 g/km) in the 911 Carrera 4 GTS Coupé with the eight-speed Porsche dual-clutch transmission (PDK): three tenths faster than its predecessor. A seven-speed manual transmission with a particularly short throw is available for all 911 GTS models as an alternative to the PDK.

programme.title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID
programme.sub-title: From concept vehicle to full-production ID. Buzz - How was the electric Microbus created
programme.desc: The new model line's assistance systems perfect ease of driving and safety. Included as standard in the ID. Buzz and ID. Buzz Cargo is the ‘Car2X' local warning system, which utilises signals from other vehicles and the transport infrastructure to spot hazards in real time. Also included as standard: the ‘Front Assist' emergency braking function and, in the MPV, the ‘Lane Assist' lane-keeping assistant. With new software, new assistance functions are also making their way into the ID. family. Available as an option is ‘Travel Assist with swarm data', which facilitates partially automated driving across the entire speed range and, for the first time, assisted lane-changing on the motorway. Also new: the ‘Memory Function' for automated parking on a previously saved route.

programme.sub-title: Digitalized lighting technologies in the Audi A8

programme.title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Product Highlights_en
programme.sub-title: New 2023 Range Rover Sport Design Reveal Film
programme.desc: The New Range Rover Sport has made its global premiere with a dramatic world-first climb up a flooded dam spillway in Iceland. The epic ascent saw New Range Rover Sport resist the surging torrent of water flowing down the ramp of the Karahnjukar Dam – the biggest of its kind in the world – at a rate of 750 tonnes per minute. A loss of traction risked plunging down the perilous 90m drop at the base of the spillway to the valley floor below. The successful spillway ascent was screened for the first time at an exclusive launch event at Jaguar Land Rover's Advanced Product Creation Centre at Gaydon, UK. Official James Bond stunt driver Jessica Hawkins was behind the wheel as the New Range Rover Sport demonstrated its grip, traction, performance and composure, completing the latest in a series of challenges for Land Rover's luxury performance SUV. Previous feats include a record-setting hill-climb at Pikes Peak, a first recorded crossing of the ‘Empty Quarter' desert in the Arabian Peninsula and a first ascent of the 999 steps to Heaven's Gate in China, in 2018.

programme.title: Hispano Suiza showcases its history in the Peralada Castle Museum
programme.desc: The history of Hispano Suiza is showcased, for the very first time, in the Peralada Castle Museum (Girona, Spain) where visitors will be able to contemplate the past and present of the legendary car brand founded in 1904 by Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt. The Hispano Suiza Room will close the usual tour of the Peralada Castle Museum. After years of researching to gather the largest number of pieces and objects related to its history, Hispano Suiza becomes part of this important collection. The Hispano Suiza exhibition encompasses a journey through various decades: from the beginning of the 20th century, when Hispano Suiza was founded, to the present day. After passing through a luxurious hall, the public will be able to visit a recreation of the offices of Damián Mateu and Mark Birkigt, where countless business and technical ideas, emerged and took shape, turning Hispano Suiza into a point of reference, for luxury, comfort and technical solutions. In this area, the original painting 'Dame with a mink' by Ramon Casas takes pride of place: it was used as an illustration on the company's original shares.

programme.title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation_en
programme.sub-title: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation
programme.desc: Digital Matrix LED and digital OLED technology in the new Audi A8 L Animation

programme.title: TechDay Digital Light
programme.sub-title: Digital Future Lighting - TechDay Digital Light - Digital Future Lighting
programme.desc: Safety and customer satisfaction come first at Audi. They are part and parcel of the success of the company with the four rings. In that context, light technology is steadily growing more important and creating a wider range of possibilities and perspectives, from added safety for the driver, to external communication and individualization. Systematic light digitization is making all of this possible. It is particularly visible in the new Audi A8: the forward-looking Digital Matrix LED headlights and digital OLED rear lights raise the customer experience to a whole new level: for the first time in any Audi model, light is completely digitized. The car can be individualized even further through its digital OLED rear lights. The Digital Matrix LED headlights also include three new functions: advanced traffic information, a lane light with direction indicator lights on highways, and an orientation light on country roads. These features not only demonstrate Audi's “Vorsprung durch Technik,” they also add value.

programme.title: 2022 Peugeot 308
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Peugeot 308 - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The sixth generation Opel/Vauxhall Astra and third generation Peugeot 308 are both based on the Stellantis EMP2 platform and, unsurprisingly, score very similarly across all four areas of assessment. Both the offset test and the full-width crash test highlighted marginal chest injury protection for average male and small female drivers, and neither car was equipped with a centre airbag for far-side crash protection, a countermeasure which is increasingly common on modern cars. Both cars offer plenty of crash avoidance technology but do not include some of the latest advancements introduced in the market. The cars' four-star ratings apply also to their PHEV variants.

programme.title: 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge
programme.sub-title: Crash & Safety Tests - 2022 Volvo C40 Recharge - Crash & Safety Tests
programme.desc: The fully electric Volvo C40 Recharge has been awarded a five-star safety rating in the 2022 Euro NCAP tests, joining its siblings in the Volvo Cars line-up as one of the safest cars on the road today. The rating continues Volvo Cars' five-star streak in Euro NCAP testing, as all tested Volvo models on sale today received five stars in their respective Euro NCAP assessments. The C40 Recharge scored especially well on occupant safety and driver assist systems, helped by one of the most extensive standard safety offers in its segment. Among many other scenarios, these safety technologies help drivers detect and avoid collisions, remain in their lane and reduce the impact of accidentally running off the road.

programme.title: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Róisín Murphy and the crew join Vivienne, Ger and their five young kids at their mid-terrace 3-bedroom house in Leixlip, County Kildare.

programme.title: Home Rescue
programme.desc: Róisín and the crew spend three days with Annette from Tallaght, helping her rescue two hopelessly cluttered bedrooms.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Travelling east from Bangkok, Duncan travels to the floating markets at Samut Songkhram to have boat Noodles before heading to the Organic farms in Nakhom Pathom.

programme.title: Duncan's Thai Kitchen
programme.desc: Episode 4 takes us to Kanchanaburi where Duncan visits the world famous Bridge over the River Kwai, cooks amazing river prawns in red curry, takes a visit to the war memorial and then travels to the Ancient city of Ayutthaya to visit the Majestic Ruins.

programme.title: Pure Design
programme.desc: Creating a living space that works for both kids and adults shouldn't mean you have to compromise on grown-up style. By using natural fibres and turning tired items into fabulous new centerpieces, Samantha Pynn transforms a living/dining room from a playroom into a glamourous living space that's sophisticated enough for a busy working mom yet playful enough for her young daughter.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: George is a retired basket ball player, and Mada is an international model. For a man over 7 feet tall, finding the perfect house might be a challenge. Danielle knows high ceilings come in all shapes and sizes, can she find a style they'll like? They also want a pool and a home theatre.

programme.title: Top Million Dollar Agent
programme.desc: Suhail and Niki have busy schedules. He's a marketing director and she's a doctor so she's often on call for a hospital downtown. Can they find a place that can help relieve stress, but also be close enough to downtown for those urgent calls? They want a secluded home with at least 1 acre and magnificent views.

programme.title: Accidental Chef
programme.desc: This week, Melvyn finds himself in South Korea. He experiences two distinctly different cultures and cuisines of the country- that of the royalties and the monks. He meets royal food expert to learn about the imperial traditions and cuisines, which had influenced so much of Korea. Then Melvyn goes zen with a famous Korean monk.

programme.title: Design For You: Trends
programme.desc: Ehrardt Nieuwoudt from Kim H Designs takes us on a tour of the iconic Sanctuary Mandela which he and his team have designed.

programme.title: World's Greatest Cruises
programme.desc: Sailing along the coast of Alaska Alaskan wildlife including whales and bears seafood treats tracing crab from the sea to the plate a classic salmon dish.

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we cover the Peninsula Paris Hotel, ocan yachting, Georges Braques exhibition in Spain, Mercedes-Benz Fashion Week, Hublot Polo Gold Cup, Goodwood Festival of Speed, European tree climing in Poland and the paleo festival in Switzerland.

programme.title: Luxury Life
programme.desc: In this episode we cover the Quantum of the Sea, Dakar 2015, Fondation Louis Vuitton, Disocvery Sport, Belstaff (David Bechkham), Vision Express.

programme.title: Finest Homes
programme.desc: Today's feature house is hidden between the trees at the base of Table Mountain.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Cranking the Summer Veggie Vibes with Jacques Lyakov
programme.desc: Discover "crank mode" in the garden and how to enable it in your own garden next season!

programme.title: The Beet: A Podcast for Plant Lovers
programme.sub-title: Blooming Big on a Small Scale with Galena Berkompas
programme.desc: A flower farmer on 6 acres, Galena Berkompas shares her tips to grow your own exquisite flowers.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.desc: The journey from novice to expert homesteader is difficult, and this episode shares lessons learned.

programme.title: The Fascinating World of Fungi with Dr. Gordon Walker
programme.desc: Mycology expert Dr. Gordon Walker shares fascinating tales of fungi and their garden contributions.

programme.title: The Beet: A Podcast for Plant Lovers
programme.sub-title: Square Foot Gardening Secrets with Rick Bickling
programme.desc: Learn secrets of building square foot gardens with Logan and square foot garden pro Rick Bickling.

programme.title: The Beet: A Podcast for Plant Lovers
programme.sub-title: Capture Rainwater Like A Pro with Martha Retallick
programme.desc: Discover all the intricacies of harvesting rainwater from your yard with Kevin and Martha Retallick.

programme.title: The Beet
programme.sub-title: Growing, Storing, & Using Herbs with Ana Talukder
programme.desc: Learn to grow, preserve, or use your garden's herbs in this insightful episode of The Beet Podcast.

programme.title: The Last Makeover In Our Studio
programme.desc: We're revealing the final transformation of our loft! See how we revamped the entryway and our main studio!

programme.title: Our DIY Home Office Makeover
programme.desc: Kelsey transforms Elliott's kitchen into a multi-functional home office in their shared space.

programme.title: We Learn How To Reupholster
programme.desc: Follow along witth Kelsey as she learns how to reupholster in a week!

programme.title: Our DIY Colorful Bathroom Makeover
programme.desc: I'm transforming my small upstairs bathroom with a serious color injection and personality!

programme.title: The Ultimate Living Room Makeover
programme.desc: Today, we're revamping Kelsey's living room into a moody media room.

programme.title: Cozy & Moody Living Room Makeover
programme.desc: Check out our basic living room transform into a cozy, moody movie/gaming room with dark paint & new tech!

programme.title: The Last Makeover In My Home
programme.desc: We're making over the LAST space in my home -- but everything goes wrong!

programme.title: Transforming My House Into A Home
programme.desc: The final Making Home! Wrapping up 5 years of DIYs, from wall patching to guest room makeovers before the big house tour.

programme.title: Do Pinterest DIYs ACTUALLY Work?
programme.desc: Rach's final Project Profit episode! See her tiled console table DIY & a heartwarming surprise.

programme.title: Empty Loft Apartment Tour
programme.desc: We're hunting for and exploring Rach's new loft apartment, the blank slate for her dream home transformation journey.

programme.title: IKEA Furniture Hacks (Bedframe With Storage)
programme.desc: Upgrade your IKEA HEMNES bed! Learn to create a custom, budget/renter-friendly MCM piece.

programme.title: Small Town, Big Story
programme.desc: Just two hours north of Charlotte, Banner Elk offers a wide array of year-around activities for outdoor enthusiasts, but is most well known for their annual Highland Games, one of the largest celebrations of Scottish culture and tradition anywhere in the world.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: Today, Jamie is up with his surprise itinerary in Arizona - taking in the Grand Canyon, Tucson, Tombstone and many other adventures in between... But how will the trip go down with the others?!

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: For this episode, Ben's planned an EPIC 48 hours in Utah, starting in Salt Lake City before venturing down to Zion National Park - but what will the other guys make of his itinerary?

programme.title: USA Through the Great Outdoors
programme.desc: Place is inextricably linked to who we are as human beings. See the American Great Outdoors in its purest and most authentic light – through the eyes of locals.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Singer/songwriter Summer Dean visits her college stomping grounds and discovers it offers more music history than Buddy Holly. Punk rock drummer Phanie Diaz checks out local art in San Antonio and rapper Lou Charles.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Lou hooks up with keyboardist Patric Johnston while Summer records an original song at a legendary recording studio. Phanie learns about the multicultural history of the accordion aka Texas squeezebox.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Phanie gets a lesson in the bajo sexto, a 12-stringed guitar, while Lou meets the owner of Houston's independent record shop Vinal Edge. Summer tries her hand at graffiti art.

programme.title: Amplify
programme.desc: Summer jams with Nathen Rogers and his band, La Croix Boix. Lou gets a tour of Sugarhill Recording Studio and Phanie's punk band plays alongside the accordion-powered Tex Mex band Piñata Protest.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: In the middle of rural Maine, Paul and Nick create an outside barbeque for the family of John Mann, an eighth generation Ulster-Scot immigrant. The Manns are true frontier-people, and completely self sufficient from their land.

programme.title: Paul & Nick's Big American Food Trip
programme.desc: Chefs Paul Rankin and Nick Nairn are in Lexington, Virginia to cook for descendants of the Ulster-Scots Lewis family who settled in the area in the 18th century. Along the way they visit a heritage pig farmer, taste some sparkling cider and they discover some delicious goat's cheese in the heart of Virginia's Piedmont region where Paul has a close encounter with a friendly goat…

programme.title: Playgrounds
programme.desc: See some of the best playgrounds in the USA through the lens of athletes.

programme.title: USA Through Film 2
programme.desc: Actor and director Jordan Spiro (Ozark, Night Comes On) spent childhood vacations with her family in New Orleans. For Spiro, the city's heritage as the birthplace of jazz is reflected in its mélange of arts and food culture that always feels fresh, inviting, and joyous, even after a lifetime of visits. “There's this ‘all senses on overload' side to New Orleans that takes my breath away every time.”

programme.title: Ask a Local
programme.desc: From beaches to bike trails to breweries, the United States has something for everyone to explore. Hear from the locals themselves and discover the best places to eat, shop, play, and more.
